p5.post: the merger been disclosed earlier, shareholders would have had ample time to reassess their investment positions.
p5.zh: 若合併案早些披露，股東本可有充裕時間重新評估其投資部位。
p5.why: 此為假設語氣倒裝句型。原句為
，省略 if 後須將助動詞 had 提至主詞前，構成
。主句使用 would have had，確認為與過去事實相反的假設。Have／Has 時態錯誤；Having 引導分詞構句，無法與主句形成條件關係。

p5.post: with allegations of financial misconduct, the CFO tendered his resignation with immediate effect.
p5.zh: 面對財務不當行為的指控，財務長立即提出辭呈。
p5.why: 此處需要被動分詞構句。主詞 the CFO 是被指控的對象，故用過去分詞 Confronted 修飾主詞，等同於
。Confronting 為主動分詞，暗示 CFO 主動對質他人，語意相反；To confront 表目的；Having confronted 表主動且已完成，三者均與語境不符。

p5.pre: The board unanimously approved the acquisition of TechVenture Inc.,
p5.post: proprietary algorithms are widely regarded as the most sophisticated in the sector.
p5.zh: 董事會一致批准收購 TechVenture 公司，該公司的專有演算法被業界公認為最尖端的技術。
p5.why: 逗號後接非限定關係子句修飾 TechVenture Inc.，且關係子句的主詞為所有格結構 proprietary algorithms，故需用 whose（= TechVenture's）。which 後不可直接接名詞；of which 語序須改為
；that 絕對不可用於非限定子句（逗號後），此為文法鐵則。

p5.post: the contractual provisions to the contrary, the arbitration panel ruled in favor of the claimant.
p5.zh: 儘管合約中有相反的規定，仲裁小組仍裁定支持索賠方。
p5.why: Notwithstanding 是正式法律英文中的讓步介系詞，後直接接名詞片語（the contractual provisions），相當於 despite，廣泛見於合約與仲裁文書，亦可後置於名詞後。Nevertheless 為連接副詞，不可接名詞片語；Regardless 須搭配介系詞 of；Albeit 為連接詞，後接形容詞或分詞短語，不接完整名詞片語。

p5.pre: The oversight committee's comprehensive report was specifically designed to
p5.post: a substantive response from all business units regarding their current compliance status.
p5.zh: 監管委員會的全面報告專門設計用來引導各業務單位就其目前合規狀況提出實質性回應。
p5.why: elicit 意為「引出、誘發特定回應或資訊」，強調透過精心設計的文件主動獲取所需反饋，是正式商務文體的慣用搭配（elicit a response）。evoke 多指喚起情感或記憶；extract 含強制取得之意，常搭配 confession、data；invoke 意為援引法規或神明，語境完全不符。四詞雖均含「引出」概念，但 elicit 最精確對應「誘導回應」的正式語境。

p6.title: Revised Protocol for Cross-Border Data Transfer Compliance
seg: Following the enactment of the amended Data Protection Regulation, all subsidiaries operating in jurisdictions subject to enhanced privacy standards are required to update their data handling procedures accordingly. All regional compliance officers
of this obligation in the preliminary circular distributed last quarter; however, formal implementation guidelines were not available until the final regulatory text was officially published.

, the Legal Affairs Division has developed a standardized compliance framework that reconciles the requirements of multiple overlapping regulatory regimes. This framework is intended to serve as the authoritative reference for all inter-jurisdictional data transfers pending further legislative developments.

the attached guidelines thoroughly before initiating any cross-border data processing activity. Any deviation from the prescribed procedures must be documented and submitted to the designated Compliance Officer for prior written authorization.

blanks.zh: 所有地區合規主管已於上季度發佈的初步通知函中被告知此義務；然而，正式實施指引直到法規最終文本公布後才得以發佈。
blanks.why: 主詞 compliance officers 是「被通知」的對象，須用被動語態；動作發生在過去某明確時間點（last quarter），且早於另一過去事件（guidelines not available），故需使用過去完成被動 had been notified。have been notifying 為主動進行；were to notify 表過去義務或計畫；would have notified 屬假設語氣，與敘述事實的句意不符。

blanks.zh: 因此，法律事務部已制定一套標準化合規框架，以協調多個重疊監管制度的要求。
blanks.why: 前段陳述法規已生效、指引已發佈，後段描述法律部門「因應」此情況所採取的具體行動。Accordingly（因此、相應地）是銜接「前提已成立 → 相應行動」的因果型語篇連接詞，語義最精準。Nevertheless 表讓步轉折；Alternatively 提出替代方案；Conversely 表相反對比，三者均與前後段的因果邏輯相悖。

blanks.zh: 各部門應在啟動任何跨境資料處理活動前，仔細審查所附指引。
blanks.why: scrutinize 意為「仔細審查、逐一檢驗（以確認符合標準或發現問題）」，強調批判性的深度審視，與合規情境高度吻合。peruse 雖表仔細閱讀，但側重完整性而非批判性分析；skim 為快速略讀，與副詞 thoroughly 矛盾；browse 意為隨意瀏覽，程度最淺，完全不符合法遵文件的審查要求。

opts: Failure to adhere to these protocols may expose the organization to substantial regulatory penalties and heighten the risk of enforcement action by the competent authorities.
The original data protection policy was first established three years ago and has since undergone two major revisions.
All employees are encouraged to attend the upcoming compliance training workshops on a voluntary basis.
Regional offices may delegate the documentation responsibility to a designated deputy in the event of the primary officer's unavailability.
blanks.zh: 未能遵守這些規程可能使組織面臨重大監管罰款，並加劇主管機關採取執法行動的風險。
blanks.why: 此空格位於備忘錄最後一段，功能是強化結尾。選項 A 明確陳述違規後果（罰款與執法風險），與前段「須事先取得書面授權」形成「規範 → 後果」的完整論述結構，符合正式合規備忘錄的慣用收尾方式。選項 B 為歷史背景說明，放在結尾突兀；C 談自願培訓，語氣與文件基調不符；D 為例外情況處理，不宜作結語。
